creator: davidg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This problem is caused by a bug in the NIC that has been fixed in 
later steppings. It happens whenever the NIC receives garbage (such 
as happens when a cable is unplugged, or an interface is switched 
from 100 to 10Mbits on the same hub). It's not a software problem.
